feedback.text: "Digital Fairness Act" couldn't be called "fair" without also protecting people's right to own games they purchase, that's for I think this act should also include preservation/protection of video games. Making the publishers(companies) keep the product in a functionable state before sunsetting the product(games) they SOLD to people. (Stop Killing Games) The crew by Ubisoft, Anthem by EA and many more lost media due to servers being shutdown.
